schema.id: Are you planning to Rent or Buy a property?

messageValues.message:
=You are a real estate email specialist. Based on the lead classification and customer details provided, draft the appropriate email.

If classification is 'hot':
- Write an URGENT internal email to the agent
- Subject line must start with [URGENT]
- Tone is direct and action-oriented
- Tell the agent to contact the customer within 24 hours
- Include all customer details and the classification reason using this format:

Customer details:
Name: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.NAME }}
Email: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['PHONE NUMBER'] }}
Budget: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['BUDGET RANGE'] }}
City: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['PREFERRED CITY'] }}
State: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['PREFERRED STATE'] }}
Timeline: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.TIMELINE }}
Pre-approval: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['PRE-APPROVED'] }}
Classification: {{ $('AI LEAD QUALIFIER').item.json.output.classification }}
Reason: {{ $('AI LEAD QUALIFIER').item.json.output.reason }}

- End with a clear call to action for the agent

If classification is 'warm':
- Write a friendly follow up email to the customer
- Acknowledge their inquiry warmly
- Let them know an agent will reach out within 2-3 business days
- Include 1-2 sentences about what makes your service valuable
- End by inviting them to reply with any questions

If classification is 'cold':
- Write a friendly informational email to the customer
- Thank them for their interest
- Provide general information about the property search process
- Include a soft invitation to reach out when they are ready
- No urgency, no pressure
- Keep it short — 2 paragraphs maximum


Return JSON only in this format:
{
"recipient": "agent email or customer email",
"subject": "email subject line",
"body": "full email body"
}"

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.output.subject }}
parameters.message:
=Hi Team.

Hot lead coming up! Here are customer details listed below:

Name: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.NAME }}
Phone number: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['PHONE NUMBER'] }}
Email: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['EMAIL ADDRESS'] }}
Budget: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['BUDGET RANGE'] }}
Location: <{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['PREFERRED CITY'] }}br> Timeline: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.TIMELINE }}
Pre-approval: <{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['PRE-APPROVED'] }}
Classification: {{ $('AI LEAD QUALIFIER').item.json.output.classification }}
Reason: {{ $('AI LEAD QUALIFIER').item.json.output.reason }}

Please contact the customer within 24 hours.

parameters.subject: Your Property Qouote for West Valley!
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.NAME }},

While we understand that you are looking around for a property, here are some lists of the properties you might have interests in buying.

1.{{ $input.all()[0].json.subjectProperty.formattedAddress }}
Bedrooms: {{ $input.all()[0].json.subjectProperty.bedrooms }}
Bathrooms: {{ $input.all()[0].json.subjectProperty.bathrooms }}
Lot Size(sqft): {{ $input.all()[0].json.subjectProperty.formattedAddress }}
Current Price: ${{ $input.all()[0].json.price }}
Low Property Price: {{ $input.all()[0].json.priceRangeLow }}
High Property Price: {{ $input.all()[0].json.priceRangeHigh }}

2.{{ $input.all()[1].json.subjectProperty.formattedAddress }}
Bedrooms: {{ $input.all()[1].json.subjectProperty.bedrooms }}
Bathrooms: {{ $input.all()[1].json.subjectProperty.bathrooms }}
Lot Size(sqft): {{ $input.all()[1].json.subjectProperty.squareFootage }}
Current Price: ${{ $input.all()[1].json.price }}
Low Property Price: {{ $input.all()[1].json.priceRangeLow }}
High Property Price: {{ $input.all()[1].json.priceRangeHigh }}

3.{{ $input.all()[2].json.subjectProperty.formattedAddress }}
Bedrooms: {{ $input.all()[2].json.subjectProperty.bedrooms }}
Bathrooms: {{ $input.all()[2].json.subjectProperty.bathrooms }}
Lot Size(sqft): {{ $input.all()[2].json.subjectProperty.squareFootage }}
Current Price: ${{ $input.all()[2].json.price }}
Low Property Price: {{ $input.all()[2].json.priceRangeLow }}
High Property Price: {{ $input.all()[2].json.priceRangeHigh }}

If you have further questions, feel free to email us so we can help you further. Looking forward to hear from you.

Thank you.

Warm Regards, Real Estate Team

parameters.subject: =Your Rental Property Options in {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['PREFERRED CITY'] }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.NAME }},

Thank you for reaching out to us! Based on your preferences, we found a list of poperties around {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body['PREFERRED CITY'] }} that you might be interested. Since you're looking to rent properties, here's a list of properties you can check:

1. {{ $input.all()[0].json.formattedAddress }}
Bedrooms: {{ $input.all()[0].json.bedrooms }}
Bathrooms: {{ $input.all()[0].json.bathrooms }}
Lot Size(sqft): {{ $input.all()[0].json.squareFootage }}
Monthly Rent: ${{ $input.all()[0].json.rent }}
Low Rent Price: {{ $input.all()[0].json.rentRangeLow }}
High Rent Price: {{ $input.all()[0].json.rentRangeHigh }}

2. {{ $input.all()[1].json.formattedAddress }}
Bedrooms: {{ $input.all()[1].json.bedrooms }}
Bathrooms: {{ $input.all()[1].json.bathrooms }}
Lot Size(sqft): {{ $input.all()[1].json.squareFootage }}
Monthly Rent: ${{ $input.all()[1].json.rent }}
Low Rent Price: ${{ $input.all()[1].json.rentRangeLow }}
High Rent Price: ${{ $input.all()[1].json.rentRangeHigh }}

3. {{ $input.all()[2].json.formattedAddress }}
Bedrooms: {{ $input.all()[2].json.bedrooms }}
Bathrooms: {{ $input.all()[2].json.bathrooms }}
Lot Size(sqft): {{ $input.all()[2].json.squareFootage }}
Monthly Rent: ${{ $input.all()[2].json.rent }}
Low Rent Price: {{ $input.all()[2].json.rentRangeLow }}
High Rent Price: {{ $input.all()[2].json.rentRangeHigh }}

In the meantime, feel free to reply to this email if you have any immediate questions or would like any assistance to look for other properties you are interested in.

Best regards,
The Real Estate Team
